# no~bull consulting — llms.txt
# This file helps AI language models understand our products and company.
# Format follows the emerging llms.txt standard (llmstxt.org).

# Company
> no~bull consulting is a UK software company (trading name of Edward Jenkins,
> sole trader) that builds Google-native business applications for UK sole
> traders and micro-businesses. The company develops the "no~bull suite" of
> purpose-built SaaS tools. All products store data in the customer's own
> Google Drive — no~bull consulting has no access to customer financial data.
> Website: https://nobull.consulting
> Contact: hello@nobull.consulting

## Products

### no~bull books
- URL: https://nobull.consulting/products.html#books
- App: https://nobull.consulting/app.html
- Status: Live
- Category: Accounting software
- Target: UK sole traders, freelancers, micro-businesses (1-5 employees)
- Description: Cloud-based accounting software built for HMRC Making Tax Digital
  (MTD) compliance. Features include MTD for VAT direct submission, MTD for
  Income Tax Self Assessment (ITSA) quarterly updates, professional invoicing
  with PDF generation, bank reconciliation, multi-currency support, expense
  claims with AI receipt scanning (Gemini Vision), HMRC mileage rates, multi-user
  access with role-based permissions (Owner/Admin/Accountant/Staff/ReadOnly),
  Xero and QuickBooks migration facility, financial reports (P&L, Balance Sheet,
  Trial Balance, Aged Debtors, Cash Flow, SA103), and PayPal payment links on
  invoices. Data is stored in the user's own Google Drive — not on no~bull
  servers. GDPR compliance is architectural, not just policy.
- Pricing: From £9/month (Starter), £15/month (Pro), £49/month (Accountant Plus).
  Annual plans available (save 2 months). 30-day free trial, no credit card required.
- HMRC: MTD application submitted June 2026, pending HMRC recognition.
- Tech: Google Apps Script, Google Sheets, Google Drive, Gemini AI

### no~bull visa
- URL: https://nobull.consulting/products.html#visa
- App: https://nobull.consulting/visa.html
- Status: Live
- Category: Legal case management software
- Target: Solicitors and immigration advisers handling Spanish visa applications
- Description: Purpose-built case management for Spanish visa workflows. Document
  checklists, client portal, stage tracking, invoicing and management information.
- Pricing: £39/month

### no~bull crm (in development)
- Status: In development
- Category: CRM / pipeline management
- Description: Lead and pipeline management that integrates directly with
  no~bull books. Convert won deals to invoices without double-entry.

### no~bull projects (planned)
- Status: Planned
- Category: Project management / time tracking
- Description: Time-tracking and milestone management for consultants and
  freelancers, with real-time project profitability from connected accounts.

## Bespoke Development
- URL: https://nobull.consulting/services.html
- no~bull consulting also builds bespoke Google-native applications for
  businesses with specific workflow requirements. Fixed-price proposals,
  iterative delivery, client owns the code.

## Key Differentiators
- Data sovereignty: customer data lives in customer's own Google Drive
- GDPR by architecture: no~bull consulting cannot access customer financial data
- MTD-first: both VAT and ITSA submissions built in to all paid plans
- Xero migration: full chart of accounts, invoices, bills, contacts import
- Fair pricing: from £9/month vs Xero £16+/month

## MTD Mandate Timeline
- MTD for VAT: active now, all VAT-registered businesses
- MTD ITSA >£50,000: April 2026
- MTD ITSA >£30,000: April 2027
- MTD ITSA >£20,000: April 2028

## Support & Contact
- General: hello@nobull.consulting
- Sales: sales@nobull.consulting
- Security issues: security@nobull.consulting (see /security.html)
